lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬਰਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kee drisatt amrit barasee |
lines.english: Nectar rains down from the glance of the God-conscious being.
The God-conscious being is free from entanglements.
The lifestyle of the God-conscious being is spotlessly pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak braham giaanee kaa braham dhiaan |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the God-conscious being is absorbed in God's meditation. ||3||
Spiritual wisdom is the food of the God-conscious being.
The God-conscious being centers his hopes on the One alone.
The God-conscious being shall never perish.
The God-conscious being is steeped in humility.
The God-conscious being holds his wandering mind under control.
The God-conscious being has no worldly entanglements.
The God-conscious being delights in doing good to others.
The God-conscious being blossoms in fruitfulness.
In the Company of the God-conscious being, all are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਭਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai hoe su bhalaa |
lines.english: The God-conscious being acts in the common good.
The God-conscious being loves the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਬਸੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai basai prabh sang |
lines.english: The God-conscious being dwells with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਪੈ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak braham giaanee japai sagal sansaar |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the God-conscious being, the whole world meditates on God. ||4||
The God-conscious being has the Naam as his Family.
The God-conscious being takes the Naam as his Support.
The God-conscious being is awake and aware, forever and ever.
In the mind of the God-conscious being, there is supreme bliss.
The God-conscious being renounces his proud ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai ghar sadaa anand |
lines.english: In the home of the God-conscious being, there is everlasting bliss.
The God-conscious being dwells in peaceful ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨਾਸ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak braham giaanee kaa nahee binaas |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the God-conscious being shall never perish. ||5||
Pure are the Teachings of the God-conscious being.
The God-conscious being is carefree.
The God-conscious being knows God.
The God-conscious being is in love with the One alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee jis karai prabh aap |
lines.english: The God-conscious being is made so by God Himself.
The God-conscious being is gloriously great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kaa daras baddabhaagee paaeeai |
lines.english: The Darshan, the Blessed Vision of the God-conscious being, is obtained by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kau bal bal jaaeeai |
lines.english: To the God-conscious being, I make my life a sacrifice.
The God-conscious being is sought by the great god Shiva.
The God-conscious being cannot be appraised.
O Nanak, the God-conscious being is Himself the Supreme Lord God. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੈ ਸਗਲ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kai sagal man maeh |
lines.english: The God-conscious being has all within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਕਉਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਭੇਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kaa kaun jaanai bhed |
lines.english: Who can know the mystery of the God-conscious being?
Forever bow to the God-conscious being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਕਥਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਅਧਾਖੵਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kaa kathiaa na jaae adhaakhayar |
lines.english: The God-conscious being cannot be described in words.
The God-conscious being is the Lord and Master of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਉਨੁ ਬਖਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kee mit kaun bakhaanai |
lines.english: Who can describe the limits of the God-conscious being?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak braham giaanee kau sadaa namasakaar |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, to the God-conscious being, bow forever in reverence. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kee gat braham giaanee jaanai |
lines.english: Only the God-conscious being can know the state of the God-conscious being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kaa ant na paar |
lines.english: The God-conscious being has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਸਦ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਹੀ ਮਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee sad jeevai nahee marataa |
lines.english: The God-conscious being lives forever, and does not die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਾ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee sabh srisatt kaa karataa |
lines.english: The God-conscious being is the Creator of all the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee mukat jugat jeea kaa daataa |
lines.english: The God-conscious being is the Giver of the way of liberation of the soul.
The God-conscious being is the Perfect Supreme Being, who orchestrates all.
The God-conscious being is the helper of the helpless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਾ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਹਾਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: braham giaanee kaa sabh aoopar haath |
lines.english: The God-conscious being extends his hand to all.
The God-conscious being owns the entire creation.
